name: Rouladen of Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Round steak in 6 thin pieces
Salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler.
2. Place each piece of beef between two pieces of waxed paper to form 6 inch diameter rolls (about 1/8 inch thick); sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Place meat on rack in pan, 4 inches from heat and broil for 1 minute on each side.
4. Spread each piece of meat with 2 tablespoons of mustard. Sprinkle evenly with bacon; top with equal amounts of carrot, onion, and one pickle spear. Roll up and secure with a wooden toothpick.
5. Heat oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium heat. Brown meat rolls on all sides.
6. Add 1 inch water to skillet. Cover and simmer for 1 hour, or until beef is tender. Remove to a warm serving dish. Pour the pan juices into a sauce bowl. Remove toothpicks before serving. Pass the sauce separately.
Makes six servings.
